creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
This new port adds devel/visualparadigm. Visual Paradigm[1] is a visual modeling tool for all kinds of UML diagrams. It is fairly superior to other alternatives already present in the ports collection like argouml.


[1] http://www.visual-paradigm.com/

Fix: 

Apply the patch that can be found here[1]

[1] https://www.dropbox.com/s/ipcwfgztpvh7z81/visualparadigm.shar.txt
